summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ARI AI Admin Panel with new Google Merchant Feed sync functionality. All backend APIs working perfectly (18/18 tests passed). Frontend integration excellent with all new features functional including price display, brand columns, and feed sync button.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns HTTP 403 due to Akakçe Cloudflare protection
flaky_endpoints.workaround: This is documented limitation - Akakçe blocks automated requests with Cloudflare

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Admin login with credentials arigastro/Arigastro2026! (200 OK)
Get current user info (200 OK)
Feed status endpoint - shows 4180 products with prices (200 OK)
Feed sync from Google Merchant - updated 4186 products (200 OK)
Product search with 'tava' parameter (200 OK)
List products with pagination showing new fields (200 OK)
Update product price (200 OK)
Dashboard statistics with updated counts (200 OK)
Price tracking data (200 OK)
SEO content generation with OpenAI (200 OK)
Get existing SEO content (200 OK)
Logout functionality (200 OK)
Frontend login page renders correctly
Login form validation and submission with test credentials
Dashboard page shows correct product count (4186 products)
Products page with new FIYATIMIZ and MARKA columns
Products table displays prices (e.g., 833,38 TL, 956,84 TL)
Products table displays brands (e.g., Öztiryakiler, CoflyTab, Arigastro)
Feed'den Fiyat Guncelle button present and functional
Product search functionality with 'tava' filter
SEO Generator page accessible and functional
Navigation between all pages working correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (18/18 tests passed including new feed sync endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI flows working, new columns displayed correctly)
